verif_result.classifier_reason: Simulation passed perfectly (150528/150528 exact matches, max_error=0, timing_pass=true). Vivado synthesis failed but the synthesis_report contains only the session header repeated twice with no error messages, no diagnostic lines, no resource overflow indicators — the log was truncated before any synth_design output was captured. All synthesis_metrics are zero (lut=0, ff=0, dsp=0, bram=0) confirming Vivado exited or crashed before producing any results. This is a toolchain capture failure, not an RTL defect.
